title: Site/ Project Engineer (Main-Con)
description:
Roles & Responsibilities:

· Assist the Project Manager in all on-site technical/ engineering matters and authority submissions.

· Prepare submission of shop drawing / Materials / MOS/ Monthly Progress Claims and PM Reports.

· Lead in Site Coordination and execution relating to the construction project.

· Planning of micro-scheduling with other trades/disciplines against the Master program

· To update structural/architectural/M&E progress with scheduling tools.

· Supervise and monitor projects carried out in accordance with the company’s operating procedures, quality standards & and contractual specifications.

· Ensuring supervisors & and foremen meet clients’ regulatory work requirements.

· To check and ensure compliance with the TOP checklist

· Responsible for all inspection activities being carried out.

· Ensuring environmental, safety, and health practices are carried out at all times.

Requirements:

· Degree in Civil / Mechanical / Electrical or recognized by PE Board/ BCA

· 1-2 years’ experience in Building Engineering projects, fresh graduates are welcome to apply

· Experience with Precast/PPVC/MET projects will be a plus

· Proficient in MS Office, AutoCAD, and BIM

· A team player with a positive working attitude

postedCompany.description:
Gin Chia Co Pte Ltd, established on 19th February 1989, is a specialized company in tiling and wet works. With over three decades of experience, we have gained an excellent reputation in the industry for our high-quality services and commitment to customer satisfaction.


We are proud to offer our expertise in various areas, including tiling and wet works for BTO projects, condominiums, landed properties, schools, and commercial buildings. Our skilled team of professionals is dedicated to delivering top-notch results, with precision and attention to detail.


At Gin Chia Co Pte Ltd, we understand the importance of creating aesthetically pleasing and functional spaces. Whether it's a residential project or a commercial venture, we have the knowledge and expertise to handle projects of any scale. Our skilled craftsmen use only the finest materials and employ the latest techniques to ensure a durable and visually appealing finish.


Customer satisfaction is our primary focus, and we work closely with our clients to achieve their project requirements.
postedCompany.name: GIN CHIA CO PTE LTD
